rules_text:
Blood 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 blood mana to play this card.)[/i]
{1}, Exert, Remove X endurance counters from a follower you control: Attack X. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose X health. If they chose a card they control, remove X endurance counter from it.)[/i]
